subcodes.first_line: Do Thou ordain, O God of all names, for Thy loved ones who dwell in Thy Kingdom that which is befitting of Thy munificence, O Fashioner of heaven and earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: قدر یا اله الاسما لاحبتک فی ملکوتک ما ینبغی لکرمک یا فاطر الارض و السما یا
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
